_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of organizational and partner authorities, responsibilities, and contributions to achieving objectives.
reference_document_element_description: Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared objectives, working norms, and accountability structures across organizational boundaries.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-S-013 (LS, cosine: 0.531), DG-T-002 (DG, cosine: 0.516).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.6/10 (raw 0.463). Shared vocabulary: [objectives, organizational]. DCWF-only terms [achieving, authorities, contributions, knowledge, partner, responsibilities] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, across, boundaries, build, cross, establishing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.878 (P=0.885, R=0.872). Balanced P/R — the 12-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Knowledge of organizational and partner authorities, responsibilities, and contr" and "Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared object" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.552 > STS 0.463 (gap +0.089). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [objectives, organizational] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.0%. Shared tokens: [objectives, organizational]. DCWF-only: [achieving, authorities, contributions, knowledge, partner, responsibilities]. WIDAI-only: [accountability, across, boundaries, build, cross, establishing].

signals.detail: STS 0.463 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
